command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute 
-- Check Ismail's (user 750572) training sets and their puzzle attempts
SELECT ts.id, ts.openingName, ts.puzzleCount, ts.cyclesCompleted, ts.totalAttempts, ts.totalTimeMs, ts.status, ts.createdAt
FROM training_sets ts WHERE ts.userId = 750572 ORDER BY ts.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
